channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Go (Daily)

item.title: 🐹 test312333/321 (25 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: test312333

📝 Repository: test312333/321

📄 Descrizione: Autonomous AI agent trained on the Tintin corpus. Self-sustaining inference loop with 10% revenue allocation to high-impact global health interventions via Giving What We Can.

⭐ Stelle: 25

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: MIT License
